The '''''Lightning''''' was a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] that was part of [[Task Force Vengeance|Task Force ''Vengeance'']]. It was involved in the failed [[Battle of Halbara|attempt]] to destroy a rebel convoy intending to deliver [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] to the [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
